ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),LEN(Description) > 60, OR( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Newsletters', OR(CreatedDate > DATETIMEVALUE("2022-12-08 15:00:00"),ISNEW())), AND(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Marketing_Channel', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Conversion_point'), OR(CreatedDate > DATETIMEVALUE("2023-03-30 11:00:00"),ISNEW())) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Description cannot be more than 60 characters
